The cursor team reports frontier-quality performance at 60% savings in online A/B tests, and 30–50% savings for early-access enterprise accounts.

I think even the you use Kimi K3 more than I do, but my hunch is that it would be a bit of a um rough edged post-training just by how big of a scale up it is and that normally means there’s a lot of performance that could still be extracted from it. subject: Unsloth vs Axolotl vs TRL vs LLaMA-Factory：四大
object: 速度、显存与多GPU对比
source_quote: Four open source projects dominate LLM fine-tuning today. Unsloth , Axolotl , TRL , and LLaMA-Factory all wrap the same underlying PyTorch and Hugging Face stack. They diverge on where they spend engineering effort.

subject: Unsloth vs Axolotl vs TRL vs LLaMA-Factory：四大
object: 速度、显存与多GPU对比
source_quote: TRL is the reference implementation layer. It ships SFTTrainer , DPOTrainer , GRPOTrainer , KTOTrainer , RewardTrainer , and RLOOTrainer . Axolotl and LLaMA-Factory both call into it. The current stable release line is v1.8.0.

subject: Unsloth vs Axolotl vs TRL vs LLaMA-Factory：四大
object: 速度、显存与多GPU对比
source_quote: Unsloth replaces parts of the modeling code with hand-written Triton kernels. Backpropagation steps are manually derived rather than autograd-generated. Hugging Face’s own writeup notes accuracy degradation is 0% versus standard QLoRA, because no approximations are introduced.

subject: Unsloth vs Axolotl vs TRL vs LLaMA-Factory：四大
object: 速度、显存与多GPU对比
source_quote: Axolotl added custom Triton kernels and autograd functions for LoRA in February 2025, explicitly citing Unsloth as inspiration. They are opt-in through lora_mlp_kernel , lora_qkv_kernel , and lora_o_kernel .

subject: AMD and Anthropic Announce Strategic Partnership to
object: :: Advanced Micro Devices, Inc. (AMD)
source_quote: SANTA CLARA, Calif., July 22, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- AMD (NASDAQ: AMD) and Anthropic today announced a strategic partnership to deploy up to 2 gigawatts of AMD Instinct MI450 Series GPUs in AMD Helios rack-scale solutions, with deployment of the first gigawatt beginning in the first half of 2027.

subject: AMD and Anthropic Announce Strategic Partnership to
object: :: Advanced Micro Devices, Inc. (AMD)
source_quote: Anthropic will deploy AMD Helios rack-scale solutions featuring AMD Instinct™ MI455X GPUs, part of the AMD Instinct MI450 Series, together with AMD EPYC™ “Venice” CPUs, AMD Pensando™ networking and ROCm™ software. Purpose-built for next-generation AI training and inference, Helios delivers the performance, efficiency and scale required for the most demanding AI workloads. This deployment builds on Anthropic’s existing use of AMD Instinct MI355X GPUs.

subject: Drafted
object: $16M in Funding to Reshape Home Design With AI
source_quote: That's the idea behind Drafted, a nine-month-old startup that uses AI to turn home-design ideas into floor plans and 3D layouts. Founded by Nick Donahue, Drafted has raised a $16 million seed round from investors including Buckley Ventures , Y Combinator , Pinterest cofounder Ben Silbermann , and OneRepublic front man Ryan Tedder. Donahue, the CEO, declined to share the company's valuation.

subject: Drafted
object: $16M in Funding to Reshape Home Design With AI
source_quote: Drafted previously raised $1.65 million at a $35 million valuation from investors including Patrick Collison and Jack Altman.

subject: Drafted
object: $16M in Funding to Reshape Home Design With AI
source_quote: Drafted is not his first attempt to make home design easier. Donahue previously ran Atmos, a startup that used technology to streamline the custom home design process. The company operated for seven years and raised about $20 million from investors, including Y Combinator, Khosla Ventures, and Sam Altman. Donahue shut it down in early 2025 as high interest rates made it harder for customers to afford the homes they had spent months designing.

subject: Drafted
object: $16M in Funding to Reshape Home Design With AI

subject: Kapture CX
object: $10 Mn Pre-Series B Funding Led by Bajaj Finserv Ventures to Scale Agentic Enterprise Stack | AP News
source_quote: BENGALURU, India, July 9, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Kapture CX , the verticalized full-stack agentic AI platform, today announced the successful closing of its $10 Mn pre-Series B funding round. The round was led by Bajaj Finserv Ventures (BFSV), part of Bajaj Finserv, one of India’s leading AI-driven financial services groups, marking the firm’s first investment in the AI landscape. Existing investors Cactus Venture Partners and India Alternatives also participated in the round.

subject: Kapture CX
object: $10 Mn Pre-Series B Funding Led by Bajaj Finserv Ventures to Scale Agentic Enterprise Stack | AP News
source_quote: Sheshgiri Kamath, Co-founder and CEO of Kapture CX, said: “Since the Series A round in 2023, Kapture has grown 4x and achieved what remains rare in the AI economy - profitability. Having an AI-first organization like Bajaj Finserv Ventures lead this round is powerful validation of our value proposition. For enterprises whose experimentation phase with AI is behind them, Kapture is where real value begins. With an infrastructure that already processes massive volumes and drives measurable impact for customers around the world, Kapture CX is the right partner for enterprises ready to truly transform with AI.”

subject: AI Adoption Strategy: 7 Steps from
object: to Production
source_quote: AI adoption strategy: 7 steps to scale from pilot to production in 2026

subject: AI Adoption Strategy: 7 Steps from
object: to Production
source_quote: An organization scaling AI without a strategy is like an orchestra where every musician plays a different song. The marketing team’s violin plays a beautiful solo, operations has a powerful drumbeat, and IT’s brass section is flawless. Each part sounds great in isolation, but together, it’s just noise. Most companies find themselves in this exact spot. They’ve got AI experiments scattered across departments, each delivering real value in isolation, but no coordinated strategy to scale those wins company-wide. The gap between “AI pilot success” and “enterprise-wide AI adoption” isn’t about technology limitations. It’s about organizational readiness, cross-departmental coordination, and having the governance foundation to scale AI safely across teams.

subject: AI Adoption Strategy: 7 Steps from
object: to Production
source_quote: Set up governance before you scale, not after. Companies that deploy AI first and add governance later discover compliance gaps that force costly rollbacks. Good governance speeds up adoption by clearing the objections that usually slow things down. The governance foundations organizations need include:

subject: AI Adoption Strategy: 7 Steps from
object: to Production
source_quote: 7 steps to scale AI from pilot to production

subject: Synthesia
object: AI Roleplay Sessions，将企业培训从视频扩展到实时模拟辅导
source_quote: On Wednesday, the British startup launched Roleplay Sessions , an interactive training product where employees can practice high-stakes conversations like sales pitches, performance reviews, and customer complaints with an AI avatar that talks back, pushes back, and then scores them against a rubric.

subject: Synthesia
object: AI Roleplay Sessions，将企业培训从视频扩展到实时模拟辅导
source_quote: Roleplay is the first release under a broader “Sessions” platform Synthesia plans to expand into other formats, including job interviews and candidate screening, TechCrunch has exclusively learned.

subject: Synthesia
object: AI Roleplay Sessions，将企业培训从视频扩展到实时模拟辅导
source_quote: The launch comes as enterprises take a harder look at whether their AI spend is paying off. Citing a meta-analysis of learning research , Synthesia argues that most corporate training — including, implicitly, its own core video product — stops short of actually changing behavior. The trainings tend to inform and demonstrate, but what really pushes someone into actually learning something is doing that thing, along with feedback.

subject: Synthesia
object: AI Roleplay Sessions，将企业培训从视频扩展到实时模拟辅导
source_quote: Roleplay also moves Synthesia into a more defensible position. The company’s avatar and voice technology are proprietary, but the underlying reasoning intelligence is OpenAI’s. By tacking on a layer that includes rubrics, performance data, and analytics, Synthesia is positioning itself less as an AI avatar company and more as a performance-management platform with a video front end.

subject: India
object: AI chatbot-led e-commerce with ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude in the mix
source_quote: India pilots AI chatbot-led e-commerce with ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude in the mix

subject: India
object: AI chatbot-led e-commerce with ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude in the mix
source_quote: India has kicked off a pilot to let consumers shop and pay directly through AI chatbots, with OpenAI’s ChatGPT leading the rollout and integrations with Google’s Gemini and Anthropic’s Claude in development, as the South Asian nation becomes the next major market for global AI companies.

subject: India
object: AI chatbot-led e-commerce with ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude in the mix
source_quote: On Thursday, the National Payments Corporation of India (NPCI), the federal body behind the country’s widely used Unified Payments Interface (UPI), partnered with OpenAI and fintech firm Razorpay to enable consumers to shop and pay directly through ChatGPT. Razorpay confirmed to TechCrunch that the pilot is being rolled out nationwide and will become widely available in the coming months.

subject: India
object: AI chatbot-led e-commerce with ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude in the mix
source_quote: India, the world’s most populous nation and home to over a billion internet subscribers, is already one of OpenAI’s top markets for ChatGPT . OpenAI has been looking to grow its footprint in the country, launching a sub-$5 ChatGPT Go plan in August to attract more subscribers. The commerce pilot is part of its broader push to deepen engagement and tap into India’s rapidly expanding digital economy.

subject: Substack
object: AI 检测工具，可显示新闻通讯的 AI 写作比例
source_quote: Substack has launched a new feature that can show you which of your favorite newsletters are being written using AI.

subject: Substack
object: AI 检测工具，可显示新闻通讯的 AI 写作比例
source_quote: This week, the newsletter and writing platform announced an integration with the AI writing detection software Pangram that will allow users to scan posts, comments, and replies on Substack’s app to see an estimate of how much of the content was written by a human and how much was AI.

subject: Substack
object: AI 检测工具，可显示新闻通讯的 AI 写作比例
source_quote: In the short term, the move might be bad for Substack’s business, as it could expose many of the newsletters on its platform that aren’t entirely written by people. That could potentially erode trust in the platform’s ecosystem of independent news and blogs, or even damage its reputation as a host of high-quality content.

subject: 英伟达黄仁勋：美国无需害怕中国
object: ，应警惕国内"封禁"呼声
source_quote: IT之家 7 月 22 日消息，英伟达首席执行官黄仁勋表示，美国无需害怕中国开源 AI 模型，真正值得担心的反而是美国国内日益高涨的“封禁中国 AI 模型”呼声。

subject: 英伟达黄仁勋：美国无需害怕中国
object: ，应警惕国内"封禁"呼声
source_quote: 黄仁勋当地时间周二在接受 Axios 专访时表示：“这些中国模型非常优秀，优秀的开源模型就应该被使用。

subject: 英伟达黄仁勋：美国无需害怕中国
object: ，应警惕国内"封禁"呼声
source_quote: 作为全球最大的 AI 芯片制造商掌门人，黄仁勋明确表示，美国企业“绝对应该”被允许使用中国开源 AI 模型。

subject: 英伟达黄仁勋：美国无需害怕中国
object: ，应警惕国内"封禁"呼声
source_quote: 这两家公司此前指责中国竞争对手通过模型蒸馏等方式获取其模型能力，并警告称，中国开源模型的迅速崛起正威胁美国在 AI 领域的领先地位。

subject: 法官批准Anthropic就盗版书籍训练Claude一案达成15亿美元
object: 协议
source_quote: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — A federal judge has approved a $1.5 billion copyright settlement in which artificial intelligence company Anthropic will pay thousands of authors about $3,000 per book after using pirated copies of their works to train its Claude chatbot.

subject: 法官批准Anthropic就盗版书籍训练Claude一案达成15亿美元
object: 协议
source_quote: District Judge Araceli Martínez-Olguín said in a Monday ruling that the class-action settlement provides “meaningful relief” to affected authors and publishers.

subject: 法官批准Anthropic就盗版书籍训练Claude一案达成15亿美元
object: 协议
source_quote: About 91% of the more than 482,000 books covered by the ruling have been claimed by authors or publishers who are now due payment.

subject: 法官批准Anthropic就盗版书籍训练Claude一案达成15亿美元
object: 协议
source_quote: Plaintiff attorney Justin Nelson said in a statement that the settlement was “the largest known copyright recovery in history. We look forward to making distributions to the Class as promptly as possible.”

subject: 巴基斯坦法院
object: AI 助手 JudgeGPT（基于 GPT-4），案件审结量增 6.3%，投资回报率 38~50%
source_quote: 在本次测试中，巴基斯坦在初审法院部署定制 AI 助手 JudgeGPT（基于 GPT-4 模型），覆盖该国 118 个法院、1559 名法官，并分三组进行对照试验。

subject: 巴基斯坦法院
object: AI 助手 JudgeGPT（基于 GPT-4），案件审结量增 6.3%，投资回报率 38~50%
source_quote: 在拉合尔高等法院（Lahore High Court）的试点项目中，AI 系统在一天内处理了 2300 个案子。

subject: 巴基斯坦法院
object: AI 助手 JudgeGPT（基于 GPT-4），案件审结量增 6.3%，投资回报率 38~50%
source_quote: 最终裁判记录显示，在获得 AI 访问权限并接受针对性工具使用培训的法官群体中，案件处理效率提升最为显著。

subject: 巴基斯坦法院
object: AI 助手 JudgeGPT（基于 GPT-4），案件审结量增 6.3%，投资回报率 38~50%
source_quote: 论文作者 Sultan Mehmood、Christoph Goessmann 和 Elliott Ash 指出， 与此对应的结果是每年额外审结 1848 宗案件，较平均值增长了 6.3%。

subject: Anthropic's $1.5B piracy
object: with book authors is a record loss that hands AI labs their biggest legal win

subject: Anthropic's $1.5B piracy
object: with book authors is a record loss that hands AI labs their biggest legal win
source_quote: Anthropic's $1.5B piracy settlement with book authors is a record loss that hands AI labs their biggest legal win

subject: Anthropic's $1.5B piracy
object: with book authors is a record loss that hands AI labs their biggest legal win
source_quote: Anthropic has to pay $1.5 billion to book authors, the largest copyright settlement in class action history. But the payout is for downloading roughly 482,460 works from piracy databases, not for AI training itself. Judge Alsup had previously ruled that AI training on legally obtained books is "transformative" and falls under fair use. The settlement is actually a win for AI labs.

subject: Anthropic's $1.5B piracy
object: with book authors is a record loss that hands AI labs their biggest legal win
source_quote: Anthropic has to pay $1.5 billion to book authors, the largest copyright settlement in class action history. But the payout is for downloading roughly 482,460 works from piracy databases, not for AI training itself. Judge Alsup had previously ruled that AI training on legally obtained books is "transformative" and falls under fair use. The settlement is actually a win for AI labs.

subject: Anthropic will
object: for Claude in a deal worth up to $5 billion
source_quote: AMD is investing up to $5 billion in Anthropic. In return, Anthropic will deploy up to 2 gigawatts of MI450 GPUs for training and running its Claude models. For AMD, this is another major deal after Meta and OpenAI as it tries to challenge Nvidia as an AI chip supplier. Critics see these agreements as circular cash flows.

source_quote: IT之家 7 月 22 日消息，@claudeai 官方账号昨日（7 月 21 日）在 X 平台发布推文，邀请 Pro、Max 以及 Teams 订阅用户， 体验 Claude Cowork 中的“录制技能”（Record a skill）功能。

subject: Claude Cowork
object: "录制技能"功能：用户录屏演示即可教会 AI 执行重复操作
source_quote: 在 Claude 桌面应用中，用户点击加号菜单选择新增的“录制技能”选项后，可以直接在屏幕上执行需要被学习的操作任务，并同步通过语音对操作步骤进行实时解说。

subject: Claude Cowork
object: "录制技能"功能：用户录屏演示即可教会 AI 执行重复操作
source_quote: Claude Cowork 是 Anthropic 公司为旗下 AI 助手 Claude 打造的一个桌面协作环境，其功能超越简单的对话交互，支持 AI 访问本地文件、保持持久记忆、连接其他应用程序，并执行自动化工作流，从而让 AI 像团队成员一样参与工作。

subject: Claude Cowork
object: "录制技能"功能：用户录屏演示即可教会 AI 执行重复操作
source_quote: Agent Skill 是由 Anthropic 提出的开放构建标准，支持开发者将特定的业务流程、操作指令、脚本和资源打包为模块化、可复用、可版本控制的“数字入职手册”。

subject: 东擎
object: Axelera AI
source_quote: 东擎 (ASRock Industrial) 昨日宣布与荷兰 AI 芯片企业 Axelera AI 达成战略合作

subject: AI 搜索侵蚀流量，Reddit 重新评估与谷歌的 6000 万美元
object: ，路透社等考虑屏蔽爬虫
source_quote: IT之家 7 月 22 日消息，《华尔街日报》当地时间 21 日报道称，随着人工智能搜索逐步侵蚀在线媒体流量，媒体业者正重新考虑与 Google（谷歌）的合作关系。

subject: AI 搜索侵蚀流量，Reddit 重新评估与谷歌的 6000 万美元
object: ，路透社等考虑屏蔽爬虫
source_quote: Reddit 此前曾在 2024 年与谷歌达成一项每年 6000 万美元的内容模型训练授权协议，但网民现在正逐步以 AI 搜索替代在 Reddit 论坛翻找内容，导致 Reddit 正在评估是否与谷歌续签这份即将结束的合同 。

subject: AI 搜索侵蚀流量，Reddit 重新评估与谷歌的 6000 万美元
object: ，路透社等考虑屏蔽爬虫
source_quote: 图源：Pexels 类似情况也发生在更传统的媒体上：路透社、今日美国考虑阻止谷歌的内容爬取机器人；Politico 员工曾考虑设置注册墙等反自动化流量举措；《经济学人》持续积极讨论退出 AI 搜索的可能性。

subject: Noetra
object: 超过 3800 亿日元政府资金
source_quote: Noetra 在成立第一年便获得了超过 3800 亿日元（IT之家注：现汇率约合 157.99 亿元人民币）的政府资金支持

subject: Olivier Pomel
object: Arrakis
source_quote: Others contributing to the funding include Olivier Pomel, founder and chief executive of Datadog, Olivier Godement, OpenAI’s head of business products, and Junaid Hussain, founder of Cambridge Aerospace.

subject: undisclosed_subject
object: 微软 Copilot 应用下月移除深度研究和播客 AI 智能体，生命周期约 16 个月
source_quote: IT之家注：微软为庆祝其成立 50 周年，于 2025 年 4 月扩展 Copilot 功能，上线深度研究（Deep Research）和播客（Podcasts）两个智能体。

subject: undisclosed_subject
object: 微软 Copilot 应用下月移除深度研究和播客 AI 智能体，生命周期约 16 个月
source_quote: 其中深度研究是一项 AI 研究辅助功能，能够针对用户提出的复杂问题，自动检索并整合多个在线信息源，最终生成结构化、附带引用的详细报告。

subject: undisclosed_subject
object: 微软 Copilot 应用下月移除深度研究和播客 AI 智能体，生命周期约 16 个月
source_quote: 而播客是一个 AI 语音功能，用户上传内容后，该智能体可以将其转换为由 2 个 AI 主持人对话的音频播客。

subject: undisclosed_subject
object: 微软 Copilot 应用下月移除深度研究和播客 AI 智能体，生命周期约 16 个月
source_quote: IT之家 7 月 22 日消息，科技媒体 Neowin 今天（7 月 22 日）发布博文，报道称微软计划 8 月 18 日在消费级 Copilot 应用中， 移除深度研究（Deep Research）和播客（Podcasts）两个智能体，生命周期约为 16 个月。

subject: OpenAI
object: data center in Georgia called 'Project Camellia'
source_quote: OpenAI is planning a data center in Georgia called "Project Camellia" with a 3.2-gigawatt power deal from Georgia Power.

subject: 英伟达
object: SVD 服务，识别 AI 生成视频准确率最高达 92%
source_quote: 英伟达发布合成视频检测器（SVD）服务，识别 AI 生成视频的准确率最高达 92%。

subject: 英伟达
object: SVD 服务，识别 AI 生成视频准确率最高达 92%
source_quote: 该服务已整合到 NIM 中，通过逐帧分析视频，利用 Meta 的 DINOv2 和 DINOv3 模型为每帧打分，最终生成百分制评分。

subject: 英伟达
object: SVD 服务，识别 AI 生成视频准确率最高达 92%
source_quote: 在 Nvidia RTX GPU 上处理一段 1080p 视频仅需 22 毫秒，50% 压缩率下仍能维持 82% 准确率。
